This item can be used in tradeskills.
Recommended level of 19. Required level of 10.

Class: ALL
Race: ALL

# Sep 28 2007 at 9:49 PM Rating: Decent
Bearzerker
Scholar
69 posts
Anybody know a recipe that calls for this... first time see it myself
▲ Page top
any recipes for this known?
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2016 at 8:30 AM Rating: Decent
Rorkus
Scholar
31 posts
Smithing: 3 Silvril Ore + Throwing Knife Mould

Other newb zone vendor trash ores, like Tin Ore, Iron Ore, and Thalium Ore, are also used to make throwing knives, but different numbers of ore are required for each type.

Edited, Sep 10th 2016 10:31am by Rorkus
▲ Page top
